docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER CUADRA, EDWARD JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2002, ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. PRESENT: COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; CLERK: P. DIAS; REPORTER: PATRICIA DOWLING.
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME HEARING SET FOR SEP-26-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-26-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218
DECREE CHANGING NAME PETETIONER WAS OVER 18. PETITION AMENDED IN OPEN COURT AND SIGNED BY PLAINTIFF. NAME CHANGED TO IVETTE JOANNA CUADRA. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUADRA, YVETTE JOANNA

documents.description: DECREE CHANGING NAME PETETIONER WAS OVER 18. PETITION AMENDED IN OPEN COURT AND SIGNED BY PLAINTIFF. NAME CHANGED TO IVETTE JOANNA CUADRA. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUADRA, YVETTE JOANNA

parties.name: CUADRA, EDWARD 18 MARGARET AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112

calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-27-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Petitioner was sworn and examined. The court permitted the petition to be modified and have Ms. Cuadra complete and sign the petition. Court orders name changed to Ivette Joanna Cuadra,
